𝗗𝗘𝗦𝗞𝗥𝗘𝗘𝗡 | Extending a computer's display to other devices wirelessly using a web browser.  🔥 Super Hot!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Extending a computer's display to other devices wirelessly using a web browser.
📅 Created: Aug 2020 • Updated: May 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Turns any device with a web browser into a secondary screen
✅ Uses WebRTC for live screen streaming
✅ Supports Windows, macOS, and Linux
✅ End-to-end encryption (mentioned in topics)
✅ Share app window (mentioned in topics)
✅ Screen sharing to multiple devices (mentioned in topics)


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 20.8K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.2K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 19 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Deskreen CE is an Electron.js application that allows users to turn any device with a web browser into a secondary screen for their computer. It utilizes WebRTC for live screen sharing and supports Windows, macOS, and Linux.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/pavlobu/deskreen

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗔𝗥𝗖𝗔𝗗𝗔 | Creating and visualizing interior floor plans and designs.  📈 Growing!

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Creating and visualizing interior floor plans and designs.
📅 Created: Feb 2022 • Updated: May 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✅ Add walls
✅ Edit walls
✅ Add/edit furniture
✅ Add doors/windows
✅ Measure tool
✅ Accurate to scale
✅ Multiple floor support
✅ Print designs
✅ Save/load support
✅ Component library
✅ Cross-platform

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Arcada is an open-source, web-based interior design and floor plan creation software. It allows users to draw walls, add doors and windows, place furniture, and measure spaces accurately to scale, with support for multiple floors and saving/loading designs.

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

𝗣𝗔𝗚𝗘-𝗔𝗚𝗘𝗡𝗧 | Enabling users to control web interfaces with natural language, making web applications more accessible and automating complex workflows like form filling and SaaS AI copilot integration.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling users to control web interfaces with natural language, making web applications more accessible and automating complex workflows like form filling and SaaS AI copilot integration.
📅 Created: Sep 2025 • Updated: May 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Easy integration directly in-page JavaScript
✅ No browser extension or headless browser required
✅ Text-based DOM manipulation
✅ Bring your own LLMs
✅ Optional Chrome extension for multi-page tasks
✅ Optional MCP Server to control browser from outside


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 18.1K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.5K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 33 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Page Agent is a JavaScript library that allows users to control web interfaces using natural language. It integrates directly into the webpage, eliminating the need for browser extensions or external tools, and enables text-based DOM manipulation powered by user-provided LLMs.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/alibaba/page-agent

𝗪𝗘𝗕𝗡𝗢𝗩𝗘𝗟-𝗪𝗥𝗜𝗧𝗘𝗥 | AI-assisted long-form web novel writing, ensuring consistency and coherence over extended narratives.  📈 Growing!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: AI-assisted long-form web novel writing, ensuring consistency and coherence over extended narratives.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: May 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Manages character settings, plot points, and world-building rules
✅ Solves AI 'forgetting' and 'hallucination' issues in long-form writing
✅ Supports serialization of up to 2 million characters
✅ Integrates with Claude Code via a plugin
✅ Provides commands for planning, writing, reviewing, and dashboard visualization
✅ Configurable RAG for context management
✅ Agent model selection
✅ Story System with state management and commit projections


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.5K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 808 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 28 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Webnovel Writer is a Python-based system designed to assist in writing long-form web novels using Claude Code. It addresses common AI writing issues like memory loss and hallucinations by managing plot points, character settings, and world-building rules, enabling continuous serialization of up to 2 million characters without contradictions.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/lingfengQAQ/webnovel-writer

✅ AI-native security testing platform

CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go, designed to automate and enhance cybersecurity testing. It integrates over 100 security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, and AI agents to manage the entire security testing lifecycle, from vulnerability discovery to reporting.
